scripts.wait-for-db: node -e "const { Pool } = require('pg'); const pool = new Pool({ host: process.env.DB_HOST, user: process.env.DB_USER, password: process.env.DB_PASSWORD, database: process.env.DB_NAME, port: process.env.DB_PORT }); const checkDb = async () => { try { await pool.query('SELECT 1'); console.log('Database is ready!'); process.exit(0); } catch (err) { console.log('Waiting for database...'); setTimeout(checkDb, 2000); } }; checkDb();"
